label: Transparent dolphin motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for morphous-dolphin
Primary request: Create only one dolphin in a graceful arcing leap, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Bottlenose dolphin with accurate streamlined anatomy, dolphin arc silhouette, smooth silver grey skin, pale belly, subtle aqua blue reflected highlights, realistic wet sheen, friendly intelligent expression, complete fins and tail visible.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any part of the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean soft studio light that preserves natural dolphin color and subtle skin detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the dolphin.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no ocean, no spray, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for morphous-dolphin
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board named "Dolphin Arc" derived from a bottlenose dolphin motif: silver grey body, aqua blue sea reflection, warm sea context, fluid collaboration system mood.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from a graceful arcing dolphin cutout. The board must visibly respect silver grey, pearl white, warm sea aqua, blue lagoon, deep dorsal grey, and soft coral warning accents.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, precise grid, generous spacing, avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Dolphin Arc", motif story, palette swatches with names, typography guidance, Japanese typography guidance with sample Japanese UI text, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation sidebar/topbar, dashboard/data widgets, line/bar/donut charts, empty/error/loading states, texture samples, radius tokens, spacing tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic CSS token preview, sample app usage.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; recommend Inter/Noto Sans JP style multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, crisp components, fluid rounded arcs in separators and chart paths, 8px card radius, soft satin surfaces.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only plus near-neutrals from dolphin skin and warm sea light: pearl foam, silver grey, mist aqua, lagoon blue, dorsal slate, warm coral.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no dark-mode background, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible micro text.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for morphous-dolphin
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode version of the "Dolphin Arc" Morphous design-system board. It must feel like the same fluid collaboration system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the same bottlenose dolphin arc motif and the light Dolphin Arc board style: silver grey body, aqua blue sea reflection, warm sea context, shadcn/tweakcn product UI, fluid arcs, satin surfaces, precise grid.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, avoid dense tiny text, preserve clear section hierarchy.
Required visible sections: title "Dolphin Arc Dark", Dark Mode label, palette swatches with names, typography guidance, Japanese typography guidance with sample Japanese UI text, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation sidebar/topbar, dashboard/data widgets, line/bar/donut charts, empty/error/loading states, texture samples, radius tokens, spacing tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic CSS token preview, sample app usage.
Visual details: deep dorsal navy and charcoal sea background, pearl/silver foreground text, aqua active states, lagoon blue charts, soft coral destructive accents, subtle wave-skin texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, 8px card radius, fluid collaborative motion lines.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; recommend Inter/Noto Sans JP style multilingual product UI.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible micro text.
